name: gate-multi-package-distinct-names-accept
description: The duplicate-hook check fires on the same export NAME across packages — not on multi-package contracts per se. The contract declares two DIFFERENT export names from two different packages (`useCheckout` under `@stripe/ggui-checkout`, `useShippingEstimate` under `@acme/shipping`); both `(package, export)` pairs are registered and neither descriptor has `requires`. The composed gate MUST accept. Guards against an over-eager duplicate check that rejects any contract spanning more than one gadget package.
